extortion.description: KMC Global is a group of wholly-owned, autonomous companies which design and manufacture equipment that enhances how industry processes material. Serving customers in a broad spectrum of manufacturing sectors such as; food, chemical, automotive, mineral processing, industrial manufacturing, agricultural, foundry, metals recycling, and energy, each company helps these processing and manufacturing-based sectors optimize production and reduce waste. The equipment manufactured collectively by the group include; conveyors, material screeners, metal crushers, bulk bag loading and unloading equipment, coolant filtration equipment, and wastewater treatment equipment.SITE: www.kmcglobal.com Address : 5944 E N Ave Kalamazoo, MI 49048 United StatesTEL#: +1 (269) 382-8200ALL DATA SIZE: ≈1,4tb 1. Accounting 2. Payroll 3. Finance 4. Engineering 5. Marketing 6. Users personal folders, docs 7. Confidential docs, NDAs & etc…
